title: What Should An AI Device Look Like? — With Alex Himel
summary: Alex Himel, Meta's VP of Wearables, discusses how AI-powered smart glasses could become the next major computing platform. The conversation covers potential applications like real-world context understanding, on-device AI, privacy concerns around facial recognition, and competitive positioning against OpenAI, Google, Apple, and Amazon.
writeup: Alex Himel, Meta's VP of Wearables, makes the case for AI-powered smart glasses as the next major computing platform. The discussion covers concrete applications including real-world context understanding and on-device AI, along with privacy concerns tied to facial recognition. It also addresses Meta's competitive positioning against OpenAI, Google, Apple, and Amazon.
